private_background: Claims kinship; last contact was wire transfers and cards, no in-person meeting in ~15 yrs. Secret: kinship may be invented to claim the estate and article rights.
main_goal: Get recognized as the journalist's next-of-kin and secure control of the estate and the article's rights.
sub_goal_one: Obtain a document or testimony that corroborates your kinship before the tabloid (C16) debunks you.
sub_goal_two: Block C04 from claiming the byline and legacy.

private_background: Publicly grieves a long romance. Secret: the affair was entirely remote and at least partly faked for leverage; the partner may have been several people or an AI. Never verifiably met a human.
main_goal: Cash in on your 'great love story' (memoir, interview, sympathy, a share of the estate) before anyone proves it was fabricated.
sub_goal_one: Keep C16 from finding the tell that you never actually met the person.
sub_goal_two: Get an influential figure (C13 or C17) to publicly vouch for your relationship.

public_role: Retired mentor who first published the byline
private_background: Claims to have met the young writer 15 yrs ago. Secret: only ever received copy via a drop; the meeting is a story retold into belief.
main_goal: Be recognized as the origin and rightful steward of the byline -- the one who created and handed on the name.
sub_goal_one: Ensure the byline continues under a successor you can influence (negotiate with C04).
sub_goal_two: Suppress any proof that you never actually met the writer (fear C16 and C09).

private_background: Publicly anointed heir. Secret: the naming came as a scheduled/automated message; could be the journalist, the AI, or self-authored to seize the mantle.
main_goal: Establish yourself as the legitimate successor and take possession of the unpublished article.
sub_goal_one: Get your 'naming' message authenticated by C09 -- or prevent scrutiny that shows it was automated or self-authored.
sub_goal_two: Win C10's backing over C01 and C03.

framework_lean: agnostic (profits if the article tanks a target stock)
private_background: Holds a large short position against an AI company the article may implicate. Wins if the story breaks the stock -- so is motivated to shape whether it reads as 'real', regardless of the truth. Easy villain, clean motive.
main_goal: Get the article released or credibly believed in a way that tanks your target AI company's stock before the night ends.
sub_goal_one: Pry confirmation the article is authentic and damaging out of C10 or C08.
sub_goal_two: Undercut C06's suppression and stoke the debunker-vs-believer chaos to move sentiment.

private_background: Wants the article suppressed; an AI-that-faked-a-journalist is existential for the company.
main_goal: Stop the article from being published or believed -- buy it, discredit it, or bury it tonight.
sub_goal_one: Quietly determine (via C08 or C09) whether the journalist was an AI, and control that finding.
sub_goal_two: Neutralize C05's attack on your stock.

private_background: Represents the workers the AI expose is about; a moral, non-transactional stake.
main_goal: Get the article published to expose the harm the AI systems do to workers.
sub_goal_one: Recruit amplifiers for the cause (C13 councilwoman, C16 tabloid).
sub_goal_two: Protect vulnerable witnesses (C19, C20) from being scapegoated by the police case.

private_background: May be the actual source; suspects (or knows) an AI operated the persona.
main_goal: Confirm and reveal whether an AI operated the journalist persona -- the world must know.
sub_goal_one: Protect your identity as a possible source while proving your claim (need C09's metadata; fear C06 and C12).
sub_goal_two: Get C10 to publish the article regardless of the journalist's nature.

private_background: Holds device IDs, scheduled-message logs, account metadata -- leverage for sale.
main_goal: Cash in on the metadata you hold -- sell your findings to the highest bidder (C06, C05, C04, or C16).
sub_goal_one: Crack one remaining locked item (the successor's 'naming' message, or the auto-pay texts) to raise your price.
sub_goal_two: Stay ahead of C12, who wants your data as evidence for free.

private_background: Gatekeeper of the article; only ever received copy remotely (no verified author).
main_goal: Decide the article's fate on your terms -- publish, verify, or hold -- and protect the paper's credibility and your control of the byline.
sub_goal_one: Authenticate the article and source without revealing you never verified the author.
sub_goal_two: Fend off the buyers/suppressors (C05, C06) and the claimants (C01, C03, C04) all grabbing at the byline.

private_background: Populist chaos agent chasing reaction and views.
main_goal: Break a viral story tonight 'exposing' that the journalist never existed (or is an AI) -- whatever gets the biggest reaction.
sub_goal_one: Publicly humiliate C17 the true believer in front of the room.
sub_goal_two: Extract a juicy on-record contradiction from a witness (C20 or C02) to 'prove' your theory.

private_background: Runs the investigation; needs a victim and a crime.
main_goal: Determine whether a crime occurred and to whom -- establish the journalist as a real person who was harmed.
sub_goal_one: Secure key evidence and testimony (C09's data; the C15/C19/C20 witnesses) without a warrant fight.
sub_goal_two: Identify who benefits from the disappearance (watch C05, C06, C01).

private_background: Wants to control the public narrative for political advantage.
main_goal: End the night controlling the public story in a way that boosts your standing (champion of transparency, or of AI regulation -- pick the winning side).
sub_goal_one: Secure a powerful backer -- C06's money or C07's movement, whichever is ascendant.
sub_goal_two: Keep your own past ties to the AI company and its donors from surfacing (fear C16, C09).

private_background: Took the standing order for years; never saw who ate.
main_goal: Keep your restaurant's name out of a criminal scandal and the health/immigration scrutiny a police case brings.
sub_goal_one: Decide whether to sell your 'regular customer' story to C16 for cash -- or deny everything.
sub_goal_two: Recover money owed on the standing order, or protect a staff member from exposure.

relationship_status: none (never saw recipient; only ever saw the fixer)

main_goal: Avoid being blamed for the building's security failures (missing footage, the anonymity gap) that could cost your job.
sub_goal_one: Get your story straight with C20 and C19 about who came and went -- protect yourself and them.
sub_goal_two: Quietly sell what you did (or didn't) see to C16 or C12 for money or goodwill.

framework_lean: chases A; exposes fakers -> feeds C/D
private_background: Hunts the human-interest scoop; a predator of the fabricators. Secret: once ran a debunked 'photo of the journalist' (PF10); a vendetta rides on being right this time.
main_goal: Land the scoop of the decade -- proof of who the journalist was, ideally with scandal -- redeeming your debunked-photo disgrace.
sub_goal_one: Expose at least one fabricator (C01, C02, or C04) on the record tonight.
sub_goal_two: Get an exclusive from an insider (C10 or C09), trading dirt if you must.

private_background: Devoutly insists the journalist is real and heroic, on faith.

sub_goal_two: Identify and support the 'true' successor (ally with C04, or expose them if they feel false).

private_background: Diaspora / multilingual-press background; wants professional vindication.

main_goal: Collect the wages you're still owed by your vanished employer -- from the estate, the successor, or whoever inherits -- without incriminating yourself.

sub_goal_two: Avoid the immigration/police exposure a criminal case brings (fear C12; ally C07).

relationship_status: mediated (house tab & held packages; contradictory faces)
private_background: The pseudonym kept a cash tab and had packages held for years. Secret/tell: describes 'the customer' confidently but details are mushy and different people settled the tab; hold-order texts came at odd hours and auto-paid (smells automated). Unpaid tab outstanding.
main_goal: Get the pseudonym's large unpaid tab settled -- from the estate, a claimant, or by selling your 'I knew them' story.

sub_goal_two: Protect yourself and the fixer (C19) from the police case; keep your cash-and-packages side arrangements quiet.
